onCreateCommand: echo 'en_US.UTF-8 UTF-8' | sudo tee /etc/locale.gen && sudo locale-gen && sudo update-locale LANG=en_US.UTF-8 LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8 && sudo chsh -s /usr/bin/zsh $USER && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y python3 python3-pip python3-venv python3-dev && sudo apt-get upgrade -y
